Structural repetition can show how  ideas are similar or related, by using the hospital: every man, every woman and every child.

The head doctor made a point of knowing the name of every patient in the That was a very, very unfortunate decision.

Nominalisation (expressing actions by nouns, ►    285.3) can help to make 3  nominalisation Preliminary results suggest that... It is possible that...

verbs such as may, suggest, or adjectives such as possible, arguable.

And academic writers may avoid presenting over-definite conclusions, by using It is clear that... It is likely that... It is important to. ..

Impersonal structures with it are frequently used.

researchers may not often appear as subjects of sentences.

Academic writing is most often impersonal, so for example the authors or 2 impersonal        writing (better than ... got ambiguous results) Early investigators obtained ambiguous results.

(better than ... had a lot of problems) The team experienced a number of problems.

Further research will be carried out. (better than ... will be done) purpose' words like do, have and get are replaced by more specific terminology.
